productDisplayName: Skechers Men Shape Grey Sports Shoes
description: Run less, get more with the skechers Shape-Ups Liv running shoes. Fab to look and a great gift for the feet, this pair of running shoes is designed with the best of technologies to offer the absolute comfort and health quicker. The curved bottom guide's the body back to natural motion, and the lightweight, flexible and soft Resalyte midsole offers absolute cushioning that protects your joints from injuries. You also get an extra pair of laces in a contrast colour and a DVD on the shoe and how to maximise the technologies for your benefit. Upper sock Fit construction with Exoskin support that acts like second skin and an extension of your foot Meshed and microperforated smooth synthetic upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for absolute durability, lightweight comfort and breathability Padded and meshed collar and tongue for in-step comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised fit Midsole Resalyte shock-absorbing midsole for lightweight, flexible comfort that protects the joints from injuries Removable cushioned footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Curved rocker bottom design for smoother heel-strike to toe-off transition, helping you run in a more natural state Has a diagonal SmartShoe bottom that adjusts each stride naturally to the the body's centre of gravity, providing fluid movement Flex groove outsole with a rubber traction sole for a nearly limitless range of free motion Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
